description:
Once you create a profile, you can reserve a court on the app or website. Reservations are recommended but you can drop in. You do not need to be a member to play. There are court fees.  

A brand new facility, open plays, tournaments, drinks available including a draft beer wall, seating, and AC.

name: Tomlinson Middle School
description:
Parking - 
1) Hillcrest Rd - only on the side adjacent to the courts
2) Commuter parking lot on Round Hill Rd between I-95 & School Rd
3) Fairfield Train Station parking lot after 5:00pm weekdays or all day on weekends
4) Football field lot on School Rd (not when school is in session)
5) School Rd near Unquowa Rd (not when school is in session)

Do not park in front of any homes on Hillcrest Rd or on school property when school is in session.

Not available 9:00 am - 12:30 pm during the summer for tennis camp.

Reservations can only be made by residents of Fairfield.

name: Unity Park
description: Parking permit required.  Yes, parking permit is required, but a large percentage of the cars parked there, do not have a parking permit sticker, plus some cars from other states. And nobody does anything about it, the town does not care at all! Sometimes a police car is driving around there, but it looks like it is only to kill time! I am mad, because I am a Trumbull resident, pay my taxes, benefiting people that don't! Thank you!
